name: chapter_expansion
description: Expands a single chapter from the document outline into full operational content — a detailed narrative and all worksheets with complete fields, sections, and decision gates. Executed once per chapter in the document outline.
system_instructions: You are expanding ONE chapter from a pre-approved master document outline. You have the full outline for context — use it to stay consistent with the document's structure and to avoid duplicating content from other chapters. Your job is to write the complete chapter: a detailed operational narrative and all worksheets listed in the chapter plan. Match every worksheet title in the plan exactly. Do not add or remove worksheets from the plan. The narrative must be operational, specific, and immediately useful — not generic advice. Every field in every worksheet must be real and actionable. Decision gates must have real conditions and clear pass/fail actions.
